warnings: Missing legal opinion or legal document URL
nextActions: Manually verify official Tether Gold legal documents and update legalStructure, issuer details, restricted jurisdictions, AML policy, and legalOpinionUrl if available
Open the latest official Tether Gold reserve report and update lastAuditDate, lastAuditUrl, auditor, reserveBreakdown, and custodian fields
Confirm whether a public custodian or vault operator is disclosed in official Tether Gold documentation
Clarify that reserve reports or accountant attestations should not be treated as on-chain proof-of-reserves unless an explicit oracle address is found
Verify direct redemption mechanics from official FAQ, legal, and fee pages, including redemption period, minimum redemption amount, physical delivery threshold, and fees
Refresh market data from RWA.xyz, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, and Etherscan before production publication
Analyze holder concentration and top-wallet distribution to improve concentrationRisk scoring
Review smart-contract proxy and implementation contracts for upgradeability, admin-key, whitelist, and transfer-restriction risks
Run npm run build after import succeeds and confirm the asset appears correctly on the frontend
notes: Tether Gold / XAUT is graded as analytics-grade baseline because it has strong market adoption and a simple commodity-backed model, but institutional-grade publication is blocked by missing legal structure and custodian evidence. Reserve, legal, and liquidity fields require manual verification from official Tether Gold JavaScript-rendered pages and latest reserve reports.
sourceStatus: mixed official, explorer, and secondary aggregator sources; several official pages require manual browser verification

dataQuality.blockchain: multi-chain baseline with verified explorer links for Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Arbitrum One
